testcase.name: test_stats_endpoint
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration53_features.py:64: in test_stats_endpoint assert response.status_code == 200, f"Stats failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Stats failed: {"detail":"هذا الإجراء متاح فقط لمشتركي المنصة"} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code
